“Telugu Matrimony Rooted
in Sacred Traditions
& Family Trust.”

Welcome to RVR Matrimony, the premium matchmaking platform for Telugu brides and grooms. Find meaningful connections rooted in Telugu traditions, compatible Gothrams, stars, and shared values.

0%Verified Profiles
0+Registered Telugu Members
0+Years of Trusted Matchmaking

Why Choose RVR Telugu Matrimony

Connecting Telugu Families with Respect, Heritage, and Complete Trust

Telugu Heritage & Lineage

Connect seamlessly across Telugu sub-castes, Gothram, and stars with shared values.

Local & Global Screening

Verified profiles from Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, and major global Telugu NRI hubs.

Jatakam & Privacy Control

Share your Horoscope (Jatakam) securely and manage who sees your contact details.

Find Your Telugu Life Partner

In Three Simple Steps

01.

Verified
Just Joined

Define Gothram & Nakshatram

Provide your traditional star, ancestral lineage (Gothram), and partner preferences for accurate matchmaking.

02.

✕
Decline
Accept

Browse Screened Profiles

Explore verified profiles of Telugu brides and grooms, filtered by education, sub-caste, and location.

03.

10:40 AM
10:42 AM
Type your message...

Initiate Shubhalagnam

Send interest requests, securely share horoscopes (Jatakam), and begin secure family conversations.

Find & connect with your matches, anytime and anywhere.

Explore Membership Plans

Find the perfect membership for your Telugu matrimonial search

All plans include verified profiles and family-focused matchmaking. Upgrade anytime to unlock more features.

Gold

Connect with confidence

₹4,999/ 3 Months
  • Browse Profiles
  • Shortlist & Send Unlimited Interests
  • View Unblurred Profile Photos
  • Chat Message Request (5 per day)
  • View Contact Details
  • Advanced Search Filters
  • See Who Viewed Your Profile
  • Photo Gallery Access
  • Profile Boost / Priority Listing
View More Features

Free

Start your journey

₹0/ Lifetime
  • Browse Profiles
  • Shortlist Profiles
  • Send Interest (Limited)
  • View Unblurred Photos
  • Chat & Messaging
  • Advanced Search Filters
  • View Contact Details
  • Horoscope Matching
  • Profile Boost / Spotlight

Premium

For serious and priority matches

₹9,999/ 6 Months
  • Browse Profiles
  • Unlimited Interests & Shortlisting
  • View Unblurred Photos
  • Full Photo Gallery Access
  • Unlimited Chat Messaging
  • Advanced Search & Filters
  • View Contact Details
  • Horoscope Matching
  • See Who Viewed You
  • Profile Boost / Spotlight
View More Features

All plans include verified profiles and family-focused matchmaking. Upgrade anytime to unlock more features.
